about.title: About
about.subtitle:
Technology for health – 
Your lifelong companion
about.desc: ToplifeAI was founded with the mission to apply artificial intelligence and data science to personalize your healthcare journey, helping everyone live healthier, longer, and happier lives.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Applying advanced AI and medical data to provide precise, personalized, and convenient healthcare solutions for everyone.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: To become the leading AI health platform in Vietnam and the region, connecting people with the world's best medical and technology solutions.

features.title: Advanced AI Technology
features.desc: Accurate data analysis, providing personalized recommendations.

features.desc: Gathering highly experienced doctors and experts from major hospitals.

features.title: Comprehensive Ecosystem
features.desc: From prevention, diagnosis, treatment to monitoring and post-treatment care.

features.title: Lifelong Companionship
features.desc: ToplifeAI always accompanies you and your family on the journey of healthy living.
